reviews.comment:
pésima la atención ,  por un error de un empleado tuve que pasar un mal rato lo dejo escrito en el libro de quejas y el señor felix bogado no se si sera encargado o que sera porque no tienen ni la cortesía de presentarse toma el reclamo y busca forma de hacerme responsable a mi del error muy lejos de disculparse por la pésima atención

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. Due to an employee's mistake, I had a very unpleasant experience. I wrote it down in the complaints book, and Mr. Felix Bogado—I don't know if he's the manager or what—didn't even have the courtesy to introduce himself. He took the complaint and tried to make me responsible for the error, far from apologizing for the appalling service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJZ0t5eFlnEAE
